visa_types.name: Online Visa Application
visa_types.overview:
To apply online for a visa to travel to Ireland please visit the website of the Irish Naturalization  and Immigration Service (http://www.inis.gov.ie/).
You will find comprehensive information on the Irish visa application process on that site.
Please also visit the website of the Visa Office, Embassy of Ireland (https://www.dfa.ie/irish-embassy/uae/our-services/visas/application-details-by-country/kuwait-visa-details/),
                                                            Abu Dhabi for information on any documentary and other requirements particular to Kuwait.
For the documents Checklist please refer to the below link:
Documents Checklist:
Visa Fees:

[irl > kwt > en > Table:Online Visa Application >  1]

To apply online for a visa to travel to Ireland please visit the website of the Irish Naturalization  and Immigration Service (http://www.inis.gov.ie/).
You will find comprehensive information on the Irish visa application process on that site.
Please also visit the website of the Visa Office, Embassy of Ireland (https://www.dfa.ie/irish-embassy/uae/our-services/visas/application-details-by-country/kuwait-visa-details/),
